title: Don’t miss this Claude update
summary: Claude Opus 4.8 introduces Dynamic Workflows, which enables launching hundreds of subagents simultaneously within a single session to parallelize task execution. The system splits complex work across multiple agents, with half performing tasks and half verifying, designed for large codebases, multi-file research, and work that would normally take days.
writeup: This video covers Claude Opus 4.8 and its new Dynamic Workflows feature, which launches hundreds of subagents at once inside a single session to parallelize task execution. The system decomposes complex work across agents, splitting them so that half carry out tasks and half verify the results. The intended use cases are large codebases, multi-file research, and projects that would otherwise take days. The design illustrates multi-agent task decomposition paired with built-in verification.
